name: Swing and Putt
about: Swing and Putt is a golf game training facility located in Aynor, South Carolina. The venue offers both an outdoor short game area and an indoor professional golf simulator experience, allowing play regardless of weather conditions. Instruction services are a core focus, including private and semi-private lessons, junior programs, and TPI Golf Fitness & Mental Game coaching, emphasizing fundamental swing mechanics and mental approach development.
why_golfers_like_it: All-weather play with both indoor simulator and outdoor short game areas
Focus on professional instruction and fundamentals of the game
Specialized coaching for juniors and TPI Golf Fitness & Mental Game training

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify if club rentals are available, but it does mention an apparel shop, suggesting players might need to bring their own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The website does not state a policy on bringing outside food or drinks.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide information on the typical duration for playing 18 holes on the simulator.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers dedicated junior lessons and focuses on teaching fundamental skills for young golfers, making it a kid-friendly environment.
